Design Program Management

NORTH STAR METRIC Z
Stabilize IBM Z clients with low growth trajectories while leveraging the ecosystem to retain clients.
  • Acceleration Strategy
    Clients already expanding on IBM Z
  • Stabilization Strategy
    Clients with low growth trajectory
  • Ecosystem Leverage
    Established BPs, ISVs, and GSI
NORTH STAR METRIC LINUXONE
Drive growth with LinuxONE by acquiring new clients and expanding within IBM Z's workload base.
  • Growth Strategy
    New clients - Regulated/Consolidation/aaS
  • Expansion Opportunity
    Existing IBM Z clients running x86 workloads
  • LinuxONE Ecosystem
    ISVs, Distros (Red Hat, SUSE, and Canonical), Partner Plus (Distributors and Business Partners)

Rhea-Specific Metrics

METRIC VALUE NOTES
1. # of User-Driven Outcomes
a. # of Roadmap Pivots
b. # of Enhancements Added
c. # of Innovations Added
2. # of Reference Candidates
3. Sponsor User Companies, Industry, Geos

5. # of Engagements
6. # of Clients in Top 80% Rev List
